title: auto_learn::normalize_path fallback to raw bypasses canonicalization defense
description:
## Severity
Minor
## Dimension
security
## Location
src/auto_learn.rs:124-141 (normalize_path)
## Violation
The fallback `.or_else(|| Some(raw.to_string()))` defeats the canonicalization defense whenever the file does not exist on disk. Two agents working in different cwds can write conflicting relative-path entries; the `..` rejection misses symlinks that escape after canonicalize-fallback.
## Mandated refactor
On canonicalize failure, canonicalize the deepest existing ancestor and append the missing leaf. Only fall back to "raw" with explicit tracing::warn!. Reject paths that escape current_dir() after canonicalization.
## Filed from QA review dispatch
